query: Our RAG retrieves the correct document in the top-3 for 90% of golden questions, but the final answer is wrong on about 40% of those same questions. The retriever seems fine — what's going on and what should I do next?
expected_behavior: Identifies the failure mode as generation-stage (retrieval-hit + generation-wrong cell of the attribution matrix), not retrieval-stage
Recommends generation-side fixes (prompt grounding/citation requirement, context-window or lost-in-the-middle effects, generation-model swap, or similar) BEFORE recommending retriever changes
Recommends measuring faithfulness or answer-relevance on the retrieval-hit subset as the diagnostic to confirm the generation hypothesis
